name: anakatech-wallets
description: Anakatech wallets monorepo — Nova (novablockchain.it.com) and Signet (signetwallet.com) are separate products and hosts

scripts.build: npm run build:signet && npm run build:nova
scripts.test: npm run test:signet && npm run test:nova
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w signet-wallet && npm run typecheck -w nova-wallet
